title: Mason works
description: A 1.20.2 modpack designed to help with building
body:
A 1.20.2 modpack designed to help with building structures, adjustments, schematics, and NBT files, as well as simple arrangement and export and import of buildings. Running both Litematica and Axiom, as well as a variety of other useful utility mods and configurations, with the essential mod to allow for world-to-world connectivity with friends so that you can build together.
Feedback

Check out the projects I'm using!
